/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 07-22-19/987,2/CONTD: TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE DEFENDANT AGREES TO A LIMITED BIFURCATION//WITEXCL:PD/X:THE PEOPLE MOVE THE COURT TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE THAT THE DEFENDANT IS ON ACM RELEASE IN CASE NUMBER 19006033/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC, DAVID DANEUZ/EXHMA:DEF A - 1 PAGE COLOR PHOTO/EXHMA:DEF B - 1 PAGE HAND DRAWN DIAGRAM/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC, ROBERT GILSON/EXHMA:DEF C - 1 PAGE COLOR PHOTO/EXHMA:DEF D - BODY WORN CAMERA FOOTAGE/ARG&SUB/HTA1:1 & 2/CTORD:THE ENHANCING ALLEGATION IS FOUND TO BE TRUE/ORNAS/WS/WEAP/RX/CTORD:THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE UNDER CURFEW, & SHALL BE AT HOME BETWEEN  FROM 1AM TO 8AM UNTIL ORDERED OTHERWISE/ /X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT MAYBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/TE:40 MIN/LDPX:05-10-19/987,2/BAIL:75,000/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 05-02-19/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 05-09-19/DOP/
